title: Close Pantheon Base for version freeze with zero open SonarCloud findings
goal: Verify main and GitHub are synchronized, remediate every open SonarCloud finding in code, and prove the final release candidate is free of unresolved static-analysis debt.

in: GitHub Actions workflow supply-chain and least-privilege remediation
Release Gate SonarCloud zero-open-issue policy alignment
Full SonarCloud debt remediation, evidence, and review
out: pantheon-ops dependency upgrade or business-module changes

minimumViableApproach: Reuse the existing GitHub Actions and SonarCloud release gate; fix each open issue in code in focused, verified batches and keep the gate closed until the query returns zero.
successCriteria: Local main and origin/main are identical and all local changes are committed and pushed before closeout.
Current main required workflows are green.
SonarCloud quality gate is OK and the full OPEN query for BUG, VULNERABILITY, and CODE_SMELL returns zero.
Release Gate passes on the final main commit.
Historical SonarCloud debt remains explicitly measured and documented as residual risk.
deferredCodeIssues: None. This task is not complete until all SonarCloud OPEN BUG, VULNERABILITY, and CODE_SMELL issues are fixed. A genuine false positive requires an individual documented rationale and is not eligible for a bulk closure.
